title: Illia's Ring Addon
description: Nastya addon that adds alliance rings
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbd362489a1cfec40269bcb55e7efa0ccbf9caf2.png)

**Welcome to Illia's Ring addon where you can use the power of Miraculous without Transforming!!!**
**

**How would this help you in your gameplay experience so here is some videos showing what our features do!!**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CK4NasjQA5M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



## List Items we have addded

**Monarch Rings Types are**

</details>
